title: foeniculum graecum
intro: Foeniculum graecum, also known as Sweet Fennel, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its tall stems and yellow flowers. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to ease digestive issues and reduce inflammation due to its high content of compounds like anethole and fenchone. The health benefits of Foeniculum graecum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of menstrual cramps, reduce flatulence, and support the immune system. Fennel is often prepared as herbal tea, essential oil, or dried seeds, which can be used to make a variety of herbal preparations, such as capsules, tinctures, and infusions.
